calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Nov-26-2008 Vacated

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-26-2008 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Paul Arshawsky, Esq. for plaintiff John Stewart Co. with property manager, Brenda Hutcherson present.
Molly A. Harcos, Esq. appearing on limited scope representation for defendants, Shirley Crutchfield, Marvin Crutchfield & Brian Wood, who are all present.

This cause came on regularly this date for settlement conference. Settlement discussions held. Case settled. Parties entered into a signed Stipulation for Entry of Judgment or Dismissal, which was then filed with the court. Settlement terms contained in the signed agreement for premises located at 51 Reuel Court, San Francisco, CA 94124.

JPT Irving Pfeffer, Clerk Clark Banayad, not reported (218)
